base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of samus_idle — a character (playable) from 1986 metroid. Samus in Power Suit standing still — facing right. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Samus in Power Suit standing still — facing right; orange/red armor; arm-cannon forward
